things.name: Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary
things.description: Eswatini's oldest and most accessible reserve - walk among zebra, hippos and warthogs

things.name: Hlane Royal National Park
things.description: White rhino, elephant and lion in Eswatini's largest protected area

things.name: Ngwenya Glass Factory
things.description: World-famous recycled glass artworks - watch craftspeople blow glass into animals and vases

things.name: Manzini Market
things.description: The busiest market in Eswatini with Swazi candles, hand-printed fabrics and crafts

things.name: Lobamba Royal Village & Parliament
things.description: Traditional royal village seat of the Swazi monarchy with the royal cattle byre

things.name: Swazi Cultural Village (Mantenga)
things.description: Living museum of traditional Swazi beehive huts, dancing and craft

things.name: Incwala Ceremony (First Fruits Festival)
things.description: The most sacred Swazi ceremony - the king's ritual dance with national warriors in full regalia

things.name: Sibebe Rock
things.description: World's second largest exposed granite dome - a challenging but rewarding scramble

things.name: Phophonyane Nature Reserve
things.description: Swimming in waterfalls on the Phophonyane River gorge

things.name: Tinkhwa (Swazi Bread)
things.description: Sweet steamed bread eaten with sishwala - maize porridge with soured milk and spinach
